About Kele

Kele Heart is a web developer based in the city of San Diego, CA. ☀️

10 Quick things about me:

  1. I am a self taught developer
  2. I started learning development/coding to make a video game
  3. I started with learning JavaScript 8 years ago
  4. I really love Ruby on Rails
  5. Wordpress pays the bills more often than not
  6. My biggest realization recently was a stack is a made up concept you can make anything work with anything
  7. I think Bitcoin is pretty cool
  8. I recently started my own vending machine business
  9. I wish I learned Java earlier
  10. I still haven't made that video game
